analyst_briefing: CRISIS regime holds at VERY HIGH conviction: system_average stable -0.68, corroborated by >=3 SA indicators (ECB Hormuz shock as historic oil disruption with 2.6% EU inflation proj; USTR tariff entrenchment; BIS crypto shadow banking). All 8 asset classes bearish/mild negative with Energy/EM Equities/Real Estate deepest deviations (-0.17 to -0.27 from baseline); directions correct amid dual shocks, no blind spot suppressions alter flags. Indicator patterns show SA dominance (energy/tariffs/regulatory) over CC (Fed/ECB holds, EU deals); no TS noise, minimal US-nonUS divergence beyond Europe leading energy narrative. Tail risks escalate: Hormuz duration underpriced (lik 0.65/imp 0.9, ERM), crypto collapse non-consensus (0.4/0.7). Cross-flags: ESA HIGH on EU coercion, ERM HIGH oil/metals, SCEM MED tariff enforcement. Stable conviction; monitor EU ratifications/USMCA for rung 4.
